subcodes.first_line: Praise befitteth and is meet for the Desired One, Who through a drop from the ocean of His love hath quickened and vivified the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که از قطره از بحر محبتش عالم را زنده نمود و بحیوه
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @praise and encouragement, @love and unity, @love of God
